summary: Code quality is solid: pinned actions (v4), minimal permissions, type-safe TS with explicit interfaces, comprehensive error handling, proper bash practices (set -euo pipefail). However, critical requirements unfulfilled: no actionlint validation shown, no act execution evidence, missing act-result.txt artifact, no TDD demonstration (tests written first). Workflow syntax appears correct but unvalidated. Cannot ship without completing validation pipeline and providing required artifacts.
